title: Taxi Split to Zagreb Airport | Fixed €520 Transfer | TAXI Antonio
description: Private taxi and transfer from Split to Zagreb Airport. Fixed €520 per car, up to 4 passengers, door to door. Book direct with Antonio.
keywords: taxi split to zagreb airport, transfer split to zagreb airport, split to zagreb airport taxi, split to zagreb airport transfer

schema.name: Taxi Split to Zagreb Airport
schema.description: Private, fixed-price taxi and transfer from Split to Zagreb Airport, 520 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, door to door.

offers.description: One-way private transfer from Split to Zagreb Airport, per car for up to 4 passengers. Return 1040 euros.

mainEntity.name: How far is Zagreb Airport from Split, and how long is the drive?

acceptedAnswer.text: The drive from Split to Zagreb Airport is around 421 km and takes roughly 4 h 35 min in normal traffic, a little longer at busy times in summer. I plan the pickup so a slow patch never leaves you rushed.

mainEntity.name: How much is a taxi from Split to Zagreb Airport?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed 520 per car, one way, for up to 4 passengers. The price is per vehicle, not per person, and includes tolls, fuel and luggage. A return trip is 1040.

mainEntity.name: What time should I leave Split for my flight?

acceptedAnswer.text: As a rule, about 3 hours before an international flight and 2 hours before a domestic one. Tell me your flight time and I will confirm the exact pickup.

mainEntity.name: Do you drop us right at the departures terminal?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. I take you straight to the departures drop-off at Zagreb Airport and help with your luggage. No parking walk, no shuttle.

mainEntity.name: Can you drop off at the private jet terminal?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. As well as the main commercial terminal, I serve the private and general-aviation terminal used for private jets and charter flights. Tell me your terminal when you book and I take you to the right entrance.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: At least 2 hours ahead so I can confirm the car and your pickup, and earlier for early-morning flights and high season. For a sooner ride, call or WhatsApp me directly.
